title: Geological Consistency
description: Every ore. Every stone. Every dimension.
body:
# Geological Consistency
> Every ore. Every stone. Every dimension.
---
> What if your Minecraft world _actually cared_ what kind of rock you were digging through?

> What if coal in granite wasn’t the same as coal in diorite?

> What if your mining strategy actually had... strategy?
---
**Introducing: Geological Consistency**

> A bold mod where every ore can generate in every stone – across all dimensions – but it actually matters where.
---
**Key Features:**
- Ore generation that respects geology (finally!)
- Every stone type influences your loot:
- More drops in tough rocks
- More XP in soft sediment
- Rarer spawns in exotic stones
- Real-world inspired logic and distribution
- Every block tells a story. Most are just screaming "DIG ME!"
---
**Why Download?**
- Because "random" is boring and you know it.
- Because mining through Diorite should feel different than mining through Slate.
- Because strategy shouldn't stop at “dig at Y -59.”
- Because you deserve to feel smart while strip mining.
---
> **Unlike those other mods that just slap ores everywhere like butter on toast, Geological Consistency ties every ore to the actual rock it's found in.
Not just visually – but mechanically.**
---
> The rock affects the reward.

> More iron per block? Depends on the stone.

> Extra XP from redstone? Depends on the host.

> Want diamonds and efficiency? You better start caring about your mineralogy.
---
> It’s not just "ore everywhere."

> It’s ore that plays fair.

> And sometimes unfair. Depends on the rock.
---
> You could keep playing Minecraft like it's 2011.
Or you could embrace a world where geology isn’t just decoration — it's gameplay.
Mine smart. Dig deeper. Rock harder.
